title: Ethanai Kavignen Lyrics Savaale Samaali Song Lyrics
stanzas:
ethanai kaneer sindhiyum
kadhal romba sugamaa irukku.

Poi kaadhal ethanai
mei kadhal ethanai
hey edhuvaaga irundha podhilum
pudhiya kadhalgal
dhinamum malarudhe

Ye podhuvaaga
thorttra kadhalum
nalla kaaviyam sollii pogudhe

poigalaal kadhal thodangum endru
therindhum kooda romba pidikkum

Pala adham evalgal
thondri maraindha pinnum
kadhal uyir vazhudhe.

Puiyaalum kadavulum
pugal pettra mannarum
ye kadhalaal adangi povadhum
adimai aavadhum
dheva ragasiam.

Ye kadhalaal buththan
koodathaan piththan aanadhu
vazhvin adhiyasayam.

Mozhigale indri
pesi vazhndhidum
kadhal endra oru jeevan

indha ulagam mulukkave
adhigam pesiya
orey varthai kadhal.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Ethanai Kavignen?

The song explores themes of love and the complexities that come with it, reflecting on how relationships evolve over time.

What is the plot context of Savaale Samaali related to this song?

This song plays during a pivotal moment in the film, highlighting the emotional struggles of the characters as they navigate their feelings for each other.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Karthik and composed by Thaman S, known for their exceptional contributions to Tamil cinema.

When was Ethanai Kavignen released?

The song was released on March 28, 2015, as part of the movie Savaale Samaali.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Ethanai Kavignen, the protagonist reflects on the trials and tribulations of love, as portrayed in the movie Savaale Samaali. The song's melancholic yet romantic tone evokes a sense of nostalgia, making it relatable to anyone who has faced heartbreak. With Karthik's emotive singing and Thaman S's melodic composition, the track beautifully conveys the depth of human emotions. It serves as a poignant reminder of love's complexities and the journey it entails.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ethanai Kavignen from Savaale Samaali is a beautifully crafted melody that captures the essence of love and longing. With Karthik's soulful voice and Thaman S's enchanting composition, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the bittersweet nature of romance. Dive into the emotional journey of this track that beautifully blends heartfelt lyrics with captivating music.
stanzaMeanings: I have written about how love does not end.
I have seen how many actors have acted, but love does not get bored.
In many love battles, love remains without any defeat.
The tears of love are very sweet.
Without this love, everyone would be like wild animals all the time.
Beloved, come my life, come my life...
If love is false, then true love will bloom every day in the midst of it.
Generally, the love that is expressed is a good poem.
Even if love starts with lies, it is still very enjoyable.
Many lowly people forget after they have fallen in love.
Beloved, come my life, come my life...
I have written about how love does not end.
I have seen how many actors have acted, but love does not get bored.
Even if the king of the forest and the king of the heavens are defeated by love, it is a divine secret.
By this love, the foolish become mad, and that is the wonder of life.
Words alone cannot express the life of love.
This world speaks a lot, but the only word is love.
Beloved, come my life, come my life...
I have written about how love does not end.
I have seen how many actors have acted, but love does not get bored.
